assertions.text: 包含 CREATE PIPE 使用 COPY INTO FROM '@my_oss_vol/logs/app/'
assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE PIPE oss_app_logs_pipe ... AS COPY INTO ods.app_logs FROM '@my_oss_vol/logs/app/'

assertions.text: 包含 FILE_FORMAT = (TYPE = 'parquet') 或等效写法
DWD 层包含 CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE，TARGET_LAG = '1 hours'，VCLUSTER，过滤 duration_ms <= 0
assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE DYNAMIC TABLE dwd.app_logs_clean TARGET_LAG = '1 hours' VCLUSTER = default_ap ... WHERE duration_ms > 0
CREATE OR REPLACE DYNAMIC TABLE dws.action_daily_stats TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM

assertions.text: DWS 层包含 AVG(duration_ms) 统计平均耗时
DWS 层按日期和 action 分组
